entity.summary: Starknet-based decentralized exchange candidate identified in the HEI verified-unadded backlog from CoinGecko and DefiLlama source data. The record is kept at low confidence pending stronger official-history evidence.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded backlog rows hei_unadded_0004 and hei_unadded_0005. External web search did not return strong official-history evidence during pre-add review, so the record relies on CoinGecko and DefiLlama database references and should be improved later before any high-confidence historical use.

events.title: 10KSwap present in exchange and DEX data sources

events.notes: This is a database-reference event, not a verified launch event. Replace with a proper launch/history event if stronger sources are found.
